description: Two modules become mutually dependent through a shared utility, creating a hidden import cycle that couples them.
body: Failure mode: module A and module B both grow to depend on a shared 'utils' module that in turn pulls from each, closing a cycle that is invisible in any single file. Detection signals: cycle-detection tool reports a loop through the util; changes in one module force rebuilds/retests of the other; lazy imports added to dodge load-order errors. Do not route cross-module coupling through a grab-bag utility. Safer fallback: split the shared util into focused lower-layer modules with no back-edges, or invert one dependency behind an interface, and confirm the graph is acyclic.
